revision.comment: history
revision.text:
{{Infobox Shinto shrine | name = Nagara Tenjin Shrine
長良天神神社 | image = Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-4.jpg | width = 250 | caption = Nagara Tenjin Shrine | type = | dedication = [[Sugawara no Michizane]] | founded = [[Kanshō]] era | closed = | founder = | priest = | address = 1972-1 Nagara Tenjin
[[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]] [[〒]]502-0071
[[Japan]] | phone = (058) 231-7703 | website = http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Japan]]. It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in [[1588]]. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''honden'' was completed in [[1801]] and the ''haiden'' was completed in [[1852]]. In [[1959]], the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until [[1986]]. {{commonscat|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[Category:Gifu, Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Visitor attractions in Gifu Prefecture]] [[ja:長良天神神社]]

It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in [[1588]]. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''honden'' was completed in [[1801]] and the ''haiden'' was completed in [[1852]]. In [[1959]], the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until [[1986]]. ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] ==References== {{Reflist}} {{commonscat|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[Category:Gifu, Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Visitor attractions in Gifu Prefecture]] [[ja:長良天神神社]]

It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. [[Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Japan]]. It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} ==References== {{Reflist}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg|thumb| File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg|thumb| File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg|thumb| File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg|thumb| File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg|thumb| File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg|thumb| File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg|thumb| {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]]

It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]]

[[Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Japan]]. It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]]

長良天神神社 | image = 長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin005.jpg | caption = Nagara Tenjin Shrine | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|35|27|3.32|N|136|46|36.04|E|source:jawiki_region:JP_scale:10000|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = [[Sugawara no Michizane]] | founded_by = | established = [[Kanshō]] era | date_destroyed = | location = 1972-1 Nagara Tenjin
[[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]] [[〒]]502-0071
[[Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Japan]]. It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[Category:qq--qq]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

[[Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Japan]]. It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]][[Category:qq 7]] [[Category:kk]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:kk]] [[Category:qq]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] [[Category:qq]][[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:New]]

[[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]] [[〒]]502-0071
[[Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[Gifu, Gifu|Gifu]], [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Japan]]. It is a [[Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] [[Category:pages which might possibly be incomplete but are most likely complete]] [[Category:I think I cleared all the incomplete or blank pages earlier]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]]

During the [[Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| }} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:New]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]]

[[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia 7]] [[Category:Pages and Categories from Wikipedia]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] [[Category:pages with valid en interwikis]]

長良天神神社 | image = 長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin005.jpg | caption = Nagara Tenjin Shrine | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{coord|35|27|3.32|N|136|46|36.04|E|source:jawiki_region:JP_scale:10000|display=title,inline}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = [[Sugawara no Michizane]] | founded_by = | established = [[Kanshō]] era | date_destroyed = | location = 1972-1 Nagara Tenjin
[[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] [[:en:〒|〒]]502-0071
[[:en:Japan|Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[:en:Ikeda Terumasa|Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] [[Category:pages with valid en interwikis]]

Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] [[Category:pages with valid en interwikis]]

Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]]

It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[:en:Kanshō|Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[:en:Saitō clan|Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[:en:Ikeda Terumasa|Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[:en:Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] }} [[sn:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]]

It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[:en:Kanshō|Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[:en:Saitō clan|Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[:en:Ikeda Terumasa|Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[:en:Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. 長良天神神社 | image = File:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg | caption = Nagara Tenjin Shrine | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{Coord|35.45092222|N|136.77667778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|WD=Q382005|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} | founded_by = | established = [[:en:Kanshō|Kanshō]] era | date_destroyed = | location = 1972-1 Nagara Tenjin
[[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] [[:en:〒|〒]]502-0071
[[:en:Japan|Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = | location = {{ill|Gifu|WD=Q45798}} }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[:en:Kanshō|Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[:en:Saitō clan|Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[:en:Ikeda Terumasa|Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[:en:Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[:en:Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} {{draft categories| [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] }} [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 26 May 2025]] {{wikidata link|Q3335060}} [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]]

長良天神神社 | image = File:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg | caption = Nagara Tenjin Shrine | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{Coord|35.45092222|N|136.77667778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|WD=Q382005|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} | founded_by = | established = [[:en:Kanshō|Kanshō]] era | date_destroyed = | location = 1972-1 Nagara Tenjin
[[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]] [[:en:〒|〒]]502-0071
[[:en:Japan|Japan]] | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = | location = {{ill|Gifu|WD=Q45798}} }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of [[:en:Gifu|Gifu]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[:en:Japan|Japan]]. It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of [[:en:Sugawara no Michizane|Sugawara no Michizane]]. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the [[:en:Kanshō|Kanshō]] era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the [[:en:Saitō clan|Saitō clan]]. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō]] era (1504–1520), but [[:en:Ikeda Terumasa|Ikeda Terumasa]] was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the [[:en:Edo period|Edo period]], the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and [[:en:Takasu Domain|Takasu]] domains. During the [[:en:Keichō|Keichō]] era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[:en:Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] {{wikidata link|Q3335060}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 26 May 2025]] [[Category:Wikidata has English label]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] {{wikidata link|Q3335060}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 26 May 2025]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]

長良天神神社 | image = File:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg | caption = Nagara Tenjin Shrine | map_type = Japan | map_alt = | coordinates = {{Coord|35.45092222|N|136.77667778|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | map_relief = | map_size = | map_caption = | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | type = | deity = {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane|2=ja|3=菅原道真|WD=Q382005|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q382005}} | founded_by = | established = {{ill|Kanshō|en|Kanshō|WD=Q1143928|lt=Kanshō}} era | date_destroyed = | location = 1972-1 Nagara Tenjin
{{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}} [[:en:〒|〒]]502-0071
{{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan}} | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = | location = {{ill|Gifu|WD=Q45798}} }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan}}. It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane}}. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the {{ill|Kanshō|en|Kanshō|WD=Q1143928|lt=Kanshō}} era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the {{ill|Saitō clan|en|Saitō clan|WD=Q2975353|lt=Saitō clan}}. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō}} era (1504–1520), but {{ill|Ikeda Terumasa|en|Ikeda Terumasa|WD=Q1385927|lt=Ikeda Terumasa}} was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period}}, the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and {{ill|Takasu Domain|en|Takasu Domain|WD=Q3034539|lt=Takasu}} domains. During the {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō}} era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[:en:Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] {{wikidata link|Q3335060}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 26 May 2025]] [[Category:qq]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]]

{{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}} | website = {{URL|http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin}} | architecture_style = | festival = | leadership = | location = {{ill|Gifu|WD=Q45798|1=Gifu}} }} [[Image:Nagara-tenjin-jinja2008-1.jpg|thumb|right|Nagara Tenjin Shrine's ''[[torii]]'']] {{nihongo|'''Nagara Tenjin Shrine'''|長良天神神社|Nagara Tenjin Jinja}} is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in the Nagara area of {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu|1=Gifu}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture|1=Gifu Prefecture}}, {{ill|Japan|en|Japan|WD=Q17|lt=Japan|1=Japan}}. It is a [[Tenmangū|Tenman-gū]] dedicated to the worship of {{ill|Sugawara no Michizane|en|Sugawara no Michizane|WD=Q382005|lt=Sugawara no Michizane|1=Sugawara no Michizane}}. ==History== [[Saitō Toshifuji]] (斎藤 利藤) first built Nagara Tenjin Shrine during the {{ill|Kanshō|en|Kanshō|WD=Q1143928|lt=Kanshō|1=Kanshō}} era (1460–1466) with the purpose of making it the family temple for the {{ill|Saitō clan|en|Saitō clan|WD=Q2975353|lt=Saitō clan|1=Saitō clan}}. [[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} era (1504–1520), but {{ill|Ikeda Terumasa|en|Ikeda Terumasa|WD=Q1385927|lt=Ikeda Terumasa|1=Ikeda Terumasa}} was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|WD=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and {{ill|Takasu Domain|en|Takasu Domain|WD=Q3034539|lt=Takasu|1=Takasu Domain}} domains. During the {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|WD=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[:en:Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] {{wikidata link|Q3335060}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 26 May 2025]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:Pages without translation templates]] [[Category:pages]]

[[Saitō Toshiyasu]] (斎藤 利安) completed repair work during the {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|qid=Q1193577|lt=Eishō|1=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} era (1504–1520), but {{ill|Ikeda Terumasa|en|Ikeda Terumasa|qid=Q1385927|lt=Ikeda Terumasa|1=Ikeda Terumasa}} was responsible for major upgrades in 1588. During the {{ill|Edo period|en|Edo period|qid=Q184963|lt=Edo period|1=Edo period}}, the Nagara area was under control of the [[Owari Domain]] and the shrine was used by the heads of both the Owari and {{ill|Takasu Domain|en|Takasu Domain|qid=Q3034539|lt=Takasu|1=Takasu Domain}} domains. During the {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} era (1596–1614), after the shrine's pavilions were rebuilt, the shrine suffered damage and new construction was started. The current ''[[honden]]'' was completed in 1801 and the ''[[haiden (Shinto)|haiden]]'' was completed in 1852. In 1959, the shrine was struck by the [[:en:Typhoon Vera (1959)|Isewan Typhoon]] and many large trees were knocked over, damaging the shrine. Repairs were not completed until 1986. ==References== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *[http://www.geocities.jp/nagartenjin/hyousi.htm Nagara Tenjin Homepage] {{in lang|ja}} == Images == File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-南参道から神門を望むnagaratenjin001.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-神門から拝殿を望むnagaratenjin002.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿nagaratenjin004.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿内部nagaratenjin007.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-拝殿天井nagaratenjin010.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-手水舍nagaratenjin003.jpg File:長良天神神社 (岐阜市)-境内から神門を望むnagaratenjin013.jpg {{Commons Category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja|Nagara Tenjin Shrine}} [[en:Nagara Tenjin Shrine]] {{Commons category|Nagara-tenjin-jinja}} [[fr:Nagara Tenjin-jinja]] [[ja:長良天神神社]] {{wikidata link|Q3335060}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Gifu]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Gifu Prefecture]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 22 May 2025]] [[Category:Special:LonelyPages 26 May 2025]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
